creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is not in Egypt. This is one of the beautiful shopping malls in Dubai. 🤎

📍Wafi City
🚆Nearest metro station: Dubai Healthcare City
👫🏻We love going here for quiet lunches and date nights. There are lots of underrated restaurants around; like Seville’s Spanish Tapas Bar and Biella Italian cafe and pizzeria.

Save for your next day out. 

#WafiCity #Dubai #dubaishoppingmall #UAE #ladyandhersweetescapes #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger

transcription.text: Oh, my life is changing every day in every possible way
